name: ato-copilot
description: AI-powered Compliance platform for NIST 800-53 assessment, remediation, and documentation in Azure Government environments

chatParticipants.name: ato
chatParticipants.description: ATO Copilot — compliance assessment, infrastructure templates, cost analysis, and knowledge base for Azure Government (IL5/IL6)

commands.name: assess
commands.description: Run a compliance assessment against NIST 800-53, FedRAMP, or DoD IL5

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain a NIST 800-53 control in plain language

commands.name: template
commands.description: Generate a compliant IaC template (Bicep or Terraform)

commands.name: cost
commands.description: Analyze cloud spending and optimization opportunities

commands.name: remediate
commands.description: Get remediation steps for a compliance finding
